revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{日本の古墳| 名称=三変稲荷神社古墳| 所在地=埼玉県川越市小仙波4-9| 形状=方墳| 規模=一辺20~25m| 築造年代=4世紀末| 出...'
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳| 名称=三変稲荷神社古墳| 所在地=埼玉県川越市小仙波4-9| 形状=方墳| 規模=一辺20~25m| 築造年代=4世紀末| 出土品=土師器、石釧、銅鏡| }}
'''三変稲荷神社古墳'''（さんぺんいなりじんじゃこふん）は、[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]にある[[方墳]]である。仙波古墳群を構成する一基。平成12年(2000)川越市指定史跡に指定された。
墳頂に三変稲荷神社が祀られている。墳丘は一辺20メートル～25メートルの歪んだ方形で、幅5～7メートルの周溝が巡る。昭和37年(1962)墳丘および西側の茶畑から碧玉製石釧と斜縁だ龍鏡が掘り出された。昭和60年(1985)埼玉県史編纂事業の一環として周溝確認を中心とした発掘調査が行われ、周溝から焼成前底部穿孔土師器甕が発掘されている。出土品の特徴から4世紀末の築造とされ、出土品は昭和63年(1988)1月29日付で川越市指定考古資料に指定された。
== 参考文献 == 塩野博 『埼玉の古墳 北足立・入間』 さきたま出版会 2004年
== 関連項目 == * [[日本の古墳一覧]] * [[埼玉県の古墳一覧]]

{{日本の古墳| 名称=三変稲荷神社古墳| 所在地=埼玉県川越市小仙波4-9| 形状=方墳| 規模=一辺20~25m| 築造年代=4世紀末| 出土品=土師器、石釧、銅鏡| }}

墳頂に三変稲荷神社が祀られている。墳丘は一辺20メートル～25メートルの歪んだ方形で、幅5～7メートルの周溝が巡る。昭和37年(1962)墳丘および西側の茶畑から碧玉製石釧と斜縁だ龍鏡が掘り出された。昭和60年(1985)埼玉県史編纂事業の一環として周溝確認を中心とした発掘調査が行われ、周溝から焼成前底部穿孔土師器甕が発掘されている。出土品の特徴から4世紀末の築造とされ、出土品は昭和63年(1988)1月29日付で川越市指定考古資料に指定された。
== 参考文献 == 塩野博 『埼玉の古墳 北足立・入間』 さきたま出版会 2004年

{{単一の出典|date=2013年10月21日 (月) 07:17 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳| 名称=三変稲荷神社古墳| 画像 =[[ファイル:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg|250px]]| 画像キャプション =三変稲荷神社古墳（2013年8月）| 所属=[[仙波古墳群]]| 所在地=埼玉県川越市小仙波4-9| 緯度度 =35 |緯度分 =54 |緯度秒 =54.2 | 経度度 =139 |経度分 =29 |経度秒 =39.76 | 形状=方墳| 規模=一辺20~25m| 築造年代=4世紀末| 出土品=土師器、石釧、銅鏡| }}
'''三変稲荷神社古墳'''（さんぺんいなりじんじゃこふん）は、[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]にある[[方墳]]である。[[仙波古墳群]]を構成する一基。2000年(平成12年)川越市指定史跡に指定された。
墳頂に三変稲荷神社が祀られている。墳丘は一辺20メートルから25メートルの歪んだ方形で、幅5〜7メートルの周溝が巡る。1962年(昭和37年)墳丘および西側の茶畑から碧玉製石釧と斜縁だ龍鏡が掘り出された。1985年(昭和60年)に埼玉県史編纂事業の一環として周溝確認を中心とした発掘調査が行われ、周溝から焼成前底部穿孔[[土師器]][[甕]]が発掘されている。出土品の特徴から[[4世紀]]末の築造とされ、出土品は1988年(昭和63年)1月29日付で川越市指定考古資料に指定された。
== 参考文献 == * 塩野博 『埼玉の古墳 北足立・入間』pp499-503、さきたま出版会、2004年

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = {{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013年8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013年8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群}} |所在地 = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kawagoe City|ja|川越市}}小仙波4-9 |type = 方墳 |規模 = 一辺20～25メートル |築造年代 = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|lat_deg=35|lat_min=54|lat_sec=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=所在地|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |史跡指定 = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in {{ill|Kawagoe City|ja|川越市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群}}, and was designated a city-designated historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the excavated items, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The excavated items were designated as city-designated tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳出土品|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}}== See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Information: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{日本の文化財}} {{japanese-history-stub}} [[Category:Ancient Tombs in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe City]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:City-designated Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:11]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = {{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群}} |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kawagoe City|ja|川越市}}小仙波4-9 |type = 方墳 |area = 一辺20～25メートル |築造年代 = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|coordinates=35|coordinates=54|coordinates=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|map_dot_label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |史跡指定 = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in {{ill|Kawagoe City|ja|川越市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群}}, and was other_designation1 a city-other_designation1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were other_designation1 as city-other_designation1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳出土品|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{日本の文化財}} {{japanese-history-stub}} [[Category:Ancient Tombs in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe City]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:City-other_designation1 other_designations in Saitama Prefecture]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:11]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = {{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群}} |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kawagoe City|ja|川越市}}小仙波4-9 |type = 方墳 |area = 一辺20～25メートル |築造年代 = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|coordinates=35|coordinates=54|coordinates=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|map_dot_label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |史跡指定 = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in {{ill|Kawagoe City|ja|川越市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳出土品|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{日本の文化財}} {{japanese-history-stub}} [[Category:Ancient Tombs in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe City]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:City-Historic Site1 Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:11]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=三変稲荷神社古墳 |画像 =[[ファイル:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg|250px]] |画像キャプション =三変稲荷神社古墳（2013年8月） |所属=[[仙波古墳群]] |所在地=埼玉県川越市小仙波4-9 |形状=方墳 |規模=一辺20~25メートル |築造年代=4世紀末 |出土品=土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=title,inline}} |地図2={{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|lat_deg=35|lat_min=54|lat_sec=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg |marksize=28 |caption=所在地|position=top|width=200 |float=center}} |史跡指定=川越市指定[[史跡]] |有形文化財=川越市指定[[有形文化財]]（[[釧|石釧]]・[[鼉龍鏡]]） }} '''三変稲荷神社古墳'''（さんぺんいなりじんじゃこふん）は、[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]にある[[方墳]]である。[[仙波古墳群]]を構成する一基。2000年（平成12年）に川越市指定[[史跡]]に指定された{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sannpenninarijinnja.html|title=市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳|work=埼玉県川越市|date=2024-04-18|accessdate=2024-04-24}}。 ==概要== 墳頂に三変稲荷神社が祀られている。墳丘は一辺20メートルから25メートルの歪んだ方形で、幅5〜7メートルの周溝が巡る。1962年（昭和37年）に墳丘および西側の茶畑から[[碧玉]]製[[釧|石釧]]と斜縁[[鼉龍鏡]]が掘り出された。1985年（昭和60年）に『埼玉県史』編纂事業の一環として周溝確認を中心とした[[発掘調査]]が行われ、周溝から焼成前底部穿孔のある[[土師器]][[甕]]が発掘されている。出土品の特徴から[[4世紀]]末の築造とされ、出土品は1988年（昭和63年）1月29日付で川越市指定[[有形文化財]]（[[考古資料]]）に指定された{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳出土品|work=埼玉県川越市|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}}。 ==脚注== {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *{{cite book|和書|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499-503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == 関連項目 == * [[日本の古墳一覧]] * [[埼玉県の古墳一覧]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ 三変稲荷神社（古墳）] - 川越の観光・お出かけ情報 カワゴエール {{考古学}} {{日本の文化財}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:さんへんいなりしんしやこふん}} [[Category:埼玉県の古墳]] [[Category:川越市の歴史]] [[Category:方墳]] [[Category:埼玉県内の市町村指定史跡]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[三変稲荷神社古墳]] to [[Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=三変稲荷神社古墳 |画像 =[[ファイル:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg|250px]] |画像キャプション =三変稲荷神社古墳（2013年8月） |所属=[[仙波古墳群]] |所在地=埼玉県川越市小仙波4-9 |形状=方墳 |規模=一辺20~25メートル |築造年代=4世紀末 |出土品=土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=title,inline}} |地図2={{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|lat_deg=35|lat_min=54|lat_sec=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg |marksize=28 |caption=所在地|position=top|width=200 |float=center}} |史跡指定=川越市指定[[史跡]] |有形文化財=川越市指定[[有形文化財]]（[[釧|石釧]]・[[鼉龍鏡]]） }} '''三変稲荷神社古墳'''（さんぺんいなりじんじゃこふん）は、[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]にある[[方墳]]である。[[仙波古墳群]]を構成する一基。2000年（平成12年）に川越市指定[[史跡]]に指定された{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sannpenninarijinnja.html|title=市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳|work=埼玉県川越市|date=2024-04-18|accessdate=2024-04-24}}。 ==概要== 墳頂に三変稲荷神社が祀られている。墳丘は一辺20メートルから25メートルの歪んだ方形で、幅5〜7メートルの周溝が巡る。1962年（昭和37年）に墳丘および西側の茶畑から[[碧玉]]製[[釧|石釧]]と斜縁[[鼉龍鏡]]が掘り出された。1985年（昭和60年）に『埼玉県史』編纂事業の一環として周溝確認を中心とした[[発掘調査]]が行われ、周溝から焼成前底部穿孔のある[[土師器]][[甕]]が発掘されている。出土品の特徴から[[4世紀]]末の築造とされ、出土品は1988年（昭和63年）1月29日付で川越市指定[[有形文化財]]（[[考古資料]]）に指定された{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳出土品|work=埼玉県川越市|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}}。 ==脚注== {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *{{cite book|和書|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499-503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == 関連項目 == * [[日本の古墳一覧]] * [[埼玉県の古墳一覧]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ 三変稲荷神社（古墳）] - 川越の観光・お出かけ情報 カワゴエール {{考古学}} {{日本の文化財}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:さんへんいなりしんしやこふん}} [[Category:埼玉県の古墳]] [[Category:川越市の歴史]] [[Category:方墳]] [[Category:埼玉県内の市町村指定史跡]]

Merge [[Category:埼玉県内の市町村指定史跡]] into [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] via bot
Bot: prepend Wikidata AFC comment via pages.txt
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links

[[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.915056|N|139.494378|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q17228685]] Wikidata name: Sanpen Inari-jinja Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = {{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|qq=|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}} |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]]小仙波4-9 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area = 一辺20～25メートル |built = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|coordinates=35|coordinates=54|coordinates=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|map_dot_label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|qq=|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|qq=|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|qq=|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}}

稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|qq=|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|qq=|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|qq=|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}}

The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}}

This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = {{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}} |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]]小仙波4-9 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area = 一辺20～25メートル |built = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|coordinates=35|coordinates=54|coordinates=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|map_dot_label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}}

It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. 稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.915056|N|139.494378|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17228685]] Wikidata name: Sanpen Inari-jinja Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = [[Category:Pages with files linked by ill]]{{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}} |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]]小仙波4-9 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area = 一辺20～25メートル |built = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|coordinates=35|coordinates=54|coordinates=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|map_dot_label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.915056|N|139.494378|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17228685]] Wikidata name: Sanpen Inari-jinja Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = [[Category:Pages with files linked by ill]]{{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}} |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]]小仙波4-9 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area = 一辺20～25メートル |built = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|coordinates=35|coordinates=54|coordinates=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|map_dot_label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages with files linked by ill]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

[[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.915056|N|139.494378|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17228685]] Wikidata name: Sanpen Inari-jinja Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = {{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}} |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]]小仙波4-9 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area = 一辺20～25メートル |built = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|coordinates=35|coordinates=54|coordinates=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|map_dot_label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages with files linked by ill]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
[[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.915056|N|139.494378|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17228685]] Wikidata name: Sanpen Inari-jinja Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = {{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}} |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|en|Kawagoe, Saitama|WD=Q319740|lt=Kawagoe City}}小仙波4-9 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area = 一辺20～25メートル |built = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|coordinates=35|coordinates=54|coordinates=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|map_dot_label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in {{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|en|Kawagoe, Saitama|WD=Q319740|lt=Kawagoe City}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages with files linked by ill]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in {{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|en|Kawagoe, Saitama|WD=Q319740|lt=Kawagoe City}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages with files linked by ill]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
