[[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.915056|N|139.494378|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = {{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}} |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|en|Kawagoe, Saitama|WD=Q319740|lt=Kawagoe City}}小仙波4-9 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area = 一辺20～25メートル |built = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|coordinates=35|coordinates=54|coordinates=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|map_dot_label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in {{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|en|Kawagoe, Saitama|WD=Q319740|lt=Kawagoe City}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages with files linked by ill]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

[[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.915056|N|139.494378|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 三変稲荷神社古墳 |image = {{ill|File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月）|lt=Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=三変稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Kofun 1.jpg|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}|size=250px |imageキャプション = 三変稲荷神社古墳（2013rd year 8月） |所属 = {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}} |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|en|Kawagoe, Saitama|WD=Q319740|lt=Kawagoe City|1=Kawagoe, Saitama}}小仙波4-9 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area = 一辺20～25メートル |built = 4世紀末 |burial goods = 土師器、石釧、銅鏡 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|54|54.2|N|139|29|39.76|E|display=inline,title}} |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1|coordinates=35|coordinates=54|coordinates=54.2|lon_deg=139|lon_min=29|lon_sec=39.76|map_dot_label=三変
稲荷神社
古墳|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=28|caption=location|position=top|width=200|float=center}} |Historic Site Designation = 川越市指定史跡 |有形文化財 = 川越市指定有形文化財（石釧・鼉龍鏡） |image=File:Kawagoe Sanpeninarijinjya Tumulus 1.jpg }} '''Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun''' (三変稲荷神社古墳) is a square-shaped Kofun (katafun) located in {{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|en|Kawagoe, Saitama|WD=Q319740|lt=Kawagoe City|1=Kawagoe, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the {{ill|Senba Kofun Group|ja|仙波古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senba Kofun Group|1=Senba Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222690}}, and was Historic Site1 a city-Historic Site1 historic site by Kawagoe City in 2000 (Heisei 12).[https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html 市指定史跡 三変稲荷神社古墳] – Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, 2024-04-18 (accessed 2024-04-24) == Overview == On the tumulus’s summit, the Sanpen Inari Shrine is enshrined. The mound is a distorted square measuring between 20 and 25 meters on each side, and is surrounded by a peripheral moat approximately 5–7 meters wide. In 1962 (Showa 37), a stone bead made of jade (碧玉) and a slanted-edge mirror (鼉龍鏡) were excavated from the mound and from the tea fields on its western side. In 1985 (Showa 60), as part of the Saitama Prefecture History compilation project, an excavation survey focused on confirming the moat was conducted, and earthenware vessels (土師器) with pre-fired bottom perforations were excavated from the moat. Based on the characteristics of the burial goods, the mound is dated to the late 4th century. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as city-Historic Site1 tangible cultural properties by Kawagoe City on January 29, 1988.{{Cite web|author=教育委員会 教育総務部 文化財保護課 管理担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/shishiteibunkazai/sanpenninari.html|title=市指定有形文化財 三変稲荷神社古墳Excavated Artifacts|work=Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture|date=2023-12-11|accessdate=2024-04-24}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{cite book|lang=ja|last=塩野|first=博|title=埼玉の古墳|series=北足立・入間|year=2004|date=2004-09|pages=499–503|publisher=さきたま出版会|ncid=BA68966639|isbn=4878913800|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Ancient Tombs in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=list of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}} == External Links == * [http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/sanpeninari/ Sanpen Inari Shrine Kofun] – Kawagoe Tourism Intypeation: Kawagoe Yell {{考古学}} {{Cultural Properties of Japan}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|version=100132619|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:三変稲荷神社古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q17228685}} [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages with files linked by ill]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
